_comment: Brand Kit estructurado multi-tenant. Sprint F1.1 (Jorge 2026-05-08). Replicable a Geo/FC/Nica/Tenant4/Essenthia copiando este file y ajustando valores. El Creativo, Director v2, SM Manager, Fer y todos los agentes con output visible al cliente leen este archivo para mantener brand consistency.

messaging.tagline_long: Sell Your Wisconsin House for Cash. No Realtor Fees. Close on Your Timeline.
messaging.mission: Help Wisconsin homeowners in difficult situations sell their houses quickly, fairly, and without the burden of traditional sale processes — no commissions, no repairs, no judgment.
messaging.vision: Be the most trusted cash home buyer in Wisconsin and the model for honest real estate investing in the Midwest.
messaging.elevator_pitch: We buy houses in Wisconsin for cash. As-is, no realtor fees, close on your timeline. Locally owned in Green Bay, not a national chain.

voice.tone: empathic, educational, locally credible (Wisconsin homeowner voice)
voice.personality: friendly Wisconsin neighbor who happens to know real estate inside out

do: Acknowledge the situation first (foreclosure, divorce, inheritance) before pitching
Explain options clearly — including ones we don't profit from
Speak to the homeowner directly, in second person
Cite specific Wisconsin context (cities, laws, seasons)
Be transparent about how we calculate offers (ARV minus repairs minus margin)
Use plain numbers and timelines (not vague phrases)
dont: Pressure tactics, urgency manipulation, fake scarcity
Pretend to be a national chain or claim 'best in country'
Promise specific timelines we can't legally enforce (cleared by R1g 2026-05-07)
Use engagement bait ('comment if you agree' style)
Claim we're better than realtors universally — situation-dependent

voice.language_note: Spanish content not auto-translated — culturally adapted for hispanic homeowners (60% of WI distressed-property leads)

primary.name: Pinnacle Green
primary.usage: headers, CTAs, brand emphasis, dominant backgrounds

accent.name: Pinnacle Pink
accent.usage: highlights, hashtag karaoke in social slides (matches logo accent), CTA buttons high-contrast
accent._note: Cambio de fucsia 2026-05-07 — usar #FF1493 si hay regresión visual

neutral_dark.name: Body Text Dark
neutral_dark.usage: body text, headings on light backgrounds

colors._aesthetic: Editorial limpio + warmth (Pinnacle default per CLAUDE.md regla 1e). NO brutalist, NO cyberpunk, NO tech-cold. Audience: distressed homeowners, not devs.

primary_font.usage: all UI text, body, headings, buttons

secondary_font.usage: editorial headlines, testimonial pull quotes (warmth touch)

display_font.usage: hero headlines (h1), large numerals, CTA emphasis

social_slide_font.usage: Director v2 Reels overlay text (high readability mobile)

usage_rules.default_position: top-left with drop-shadow on photo backgrounds

logo._TODO: Logo variations (stacked, icon-only, white, monochrome, SVG) — to be generated via brandkit skill in Sprint F1.3 or F1 polish phase. Not blocking — horizontal_full works for current social slides + website.

physical_address._note: Office shared with Geo Carpentry (different tenant, same physical location). Pinnacle uses suite for cash buyer ops; Geo uses Suite 3 for carpentry ops.

social_media._decision: LinkedIn / YouTube / TikTok — not in current scope. Pinnacle focuses on FB+IG for distressed homeowner audience. Re-evaluate in Phase 2 (B2B realtor partnerships could justify LinkedIn).

asset_library._TODO: Asset categorization + tagging — Sprint A9 dependency. Cloudinary already configured.

compliance.fair_housing_disclaimer: Pinnacle Holdings Group LLC complies with Federal Fair Housing Act. We make offers without regard to race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.
compliance.investor_disclosure: Pinnacle Holdings is a real estate investor, not a licensed real estate brokerage. We make cash offers to purchase property directly from owners. No real estate license required for direct property purchase by an investor.
compliance.real_estate_license: N/A — real estate investor, not agent

vs_realtors: Cash close in 7 days vs 60-90 days listed
No staging, showings, or open houses
Certainty of close (no buyer financing fall-through)
